turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, yeh Sunrise Clinic? I want to cancel two appointments actually. Both mine and my wife's.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure, I can help with both. Let me take the details one at a time. Your name first?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Mohit Tiwari. And my wife's name is Geeta Tiwari.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: And the appointment dates for each?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Mine was this Friday 3 PM with the GP. Geeta's was Saturday morning 10 AM, I think with Dr. Kulkarni.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check... yes, found both. Mohit Tiwari, Friday 3 PM with Dr. Ramesh Iyer, and Geeta Tiwari, Saturday 10 AM with Dr. Sneha Kulkarni. Cancelling both?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. Both appointments have been cancelled. You'll get confirmation messages on your registered numbers. Anything else?
